title: Om Banna
tagline: Om Banna — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Om Singh Rathore (also called Shri Om Banna and Bullet Baba) is a folk deity, whose shrine and temple called Om Banna Dham is located in Pali district near Jodhpur, India, devoted
overview.description: Om Singh Rathore (also called Shri Om Banna and Bullet Baba) is a folk deity, whose shrine and temple called Om Banna Dham is located in Pali district near Jodhpur, India, devoted to him and his motorcycle. It is located 20 kilometres (12 mi) from Pali and 53 kilometres (33 mi) away from Jodhpur on the Pali-Jodhpur highway, near Chotila village. The motorcycle is a 350cc Royal Enfield Bullet RNJ 7773. Hundreds of devotees turn up every day to pray for a safe journey.

topPlaces.name: Rohat
topPlaces.description: Rohat also known as Rohit or Rohet is a town and the tehsil headquarter of Rohat tehsil in Pali district, Rajasthan, India. Rohat is located on Jodhpur-Pali route NH 62.

items.note: Rohat also known as Rohit or Rohet is a town and the tehsil headquarter of Rohat tehsil in Pali district, Rajasthan, India. Rohat is located on Jodhpur-Pali route NH 62.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Om Banna?
faq.a: The best time to visit Om Banna is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Om Banna?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jodhpur Airport (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Jodhpur Junction (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Om Banna?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Om Banna at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Om Banna?
faq.a: Stays in Om Banna start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
